requirement_topic.en: GSA Conformity Assessment and Certificate of Conformity for BESS Imports
requirement_topic.zh: BESS进口的GSA符合性评定与符合性证书
requirement_topic.zht: BESS進口的GSA符合性評定與符合性證書

summary.en: The Ghana Standards Authority (GSA) requires imported electrical and energy equipment that falls within its high-risk goods (HRG) categories to undergo conformity assessment and obtain a Certificate of Conformity (CoC) for customs clearance. Battery energy storage systems, including lithium-ion rack batteries, containerised BESS, and associated power conversion systems, are likely subject to GSA HRG inspection depending on HS code and product description. Exporters should confirm the applicable HS codes with a Ghana customs broker and engage a GSA-approved or GSA-recognised conformity assessment body before shipment.
summary.zh: 加纳标准局（GSA）要求属于高风险货物（HRG）类别的进口电气和能源设备进行符合性评定，并取得符合性证书（CoC）方可清关。储能电池系统，包括锂离子电池架、集装箱式BESS及配套功率转换系统，视HS编码和产品描述，可能须经GSA高风险货物检验。出口商应在出货前与加纳报关行确认适用HS编码，并委托GSA批准或认可的符合性评定机构。
summary.zht: 加納標準局（GSA）要求屬於高風險貨物（HRG）類別的進口電氣和能源設備進行符合性評定，並取得符合性證書（CoC）方可清關。儲能電池系統，包括鋰離子電池架、集裝箱式BESS及配套功率轉換系統，視HS編碼和產品描述，可能須經GSA高風險貨物檢驗。出口商應在出貨前與加納報關行確認適用HS編碼，並委託GSA批准或認可的符合性評定機構。

standards_or_laws: Standards Authority Act (Ghana)
GSA high-risk goods (HRG) product certification scheme
Certificate of Conformity (CoC) for Ghana customs clearance
GSA Import Inspection programme

summary.en: GB 44240-2024 (mandatory safety standard for electrochemical energy storage systems in China) and GB/T 36276-2023 (lithium-ion batteries for stationary energy storage) are the principal Chinese compliance documents for BESS. These Chinese certificates and test reports do not substitute for Ghana GSA conformity documents, but IEC 62619-based test reports from IECEE-accredited laboratories (which may underpin the Chinese certification) can support a Ghana conformity submission.
summary.zh: GB 44240-2024（中国电化学储能电站安全强制标准）和GB/T 36276-2023（固定式储能用锂离子电池）是BESS的主要中国合规文件。这些中国证书和测试报告不能替代加纳GSA符合性文件，但基于IEC 62619由IECEE认可实验室出具的测试报告（可能支撑中国认证）可支持加纳符合性申报。
summary.zht: GB 44240-2024（中國電化學儲能電站安全強制標準）和GB/T 36276-2023（固定式儲能用鋰離子電池）是BESS的主要中國合規文件。這些中國證書和測試報告不能替代加納GSA符合性文件，但基於IEC 62619由IECEE認可實驗室出具的測試報告（可能支撐中國認證）可支持加納符合性申報。

gap.en: The exporter must confirm the Ghana HS code for each BESS component (battery racks, PCS/inverters, BMS, containers, cables), engage a GSA-approved conformity assessment body to determine the applicable route (product certificate, inspection, or CoC), and obtain the CoC before the shipment arrives at Tema or Takoradi port.
gap.zh: 出口商须确认各BESS部件（电池架、PCS/逆变器、BMS、集装箱、电缆）的加纳HS编码，委托GSA批准的符合性评定机构确定适用路径（产品证书、检验或CoC），并在货物抵达特马或塔科拉迪港前取得CoC。
gap.zht: 出口商須確認各BESS部件（電池架、PCS/逆變器、BMS、集裝箱、電纜）的加納HS編碼，委託GSA批准的符合性評定機構確定適用路徑（產品證書、檢驗或CoC），並在貨物抵達特馬或塔科拉迪港前取得CoC。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for BESS components classified as high-risk goods at Ghana customs; CoC required for clearance
mandatory_status.cn: GB 44240-2024 is mandatory for electrochemical energy storage stations in China; GB/T 36276-2023 is a recommended standard

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] GSA conformity assessment and a Certificate of Conformity are required for BESS component imports into Ghana. Confirm HS codes per component and engage a GSA-approved body before shipment — Chinese GB certificates alone are not sufficient for customs clearance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] BESS部件进口加纳须经GSA符合性评定并取得符合性证书。出货前须按部件确认HS编码并委托GSA批准机构——单独的中国GB证书不足以完成清关。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] BESS部件進口加納須經GSA符合性評定並取得符合性證書。出貨前須按部件確認HS編碼並委託GSA批准機構——單獨的中國GB證書不足以完成清關。

requirement_topic.en: IEC 62619 Lithium Battery Safety for Industrial BESS Applications

summary.en: IEC 62619:2022 (Safety requirements for secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in industrial applications) is the principal international safety standard for lithium batteries used in stationary energy storage systems. Ghana's GSA, as an IEC member body, references international IEC standards in conformity assessment. IEC 62619 covers safety requirements for cells and batteries for stationary, motive, and other applications in industrial settings. Conformity to IEC 62619 demonstrated through an IECEE CB Scheme test report from an accredited laboratory is the benchmark expected for BESS battery-level safety documentation in the Ghanaian market.
summary.zh: IEC 62619:2022（工业应用二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）是固定式储能系统锂电池的主要国际安全标准。加纳标准局作为IEC成员机构，在符合性评定中参照IEC国际标准。IEC 62619涵盖工业场景固定式、动力及其他应用的电芯和电池安全要求。由认可实验室出具的IECEE CB体系测试报告证明符合IEC 62619，是加纳市场BESS电池级安全文件的基准要求。
summary.zht: IEC 62619:2022（工業應用二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）是固定式儲能系統鋰電池的主要國際安全標準。加納標準局作為IEC成員機構，在符合性評定中參照IEC國際標準。IEC 62619涵蓋工業場景固定式、動力及其他應用的電芯和電池安全要求。由認可實驗室出具的IECEE CB體系測試報告證明符合IEC 62619，是加納市場BESS電池級安全文件的基準要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619:2022 — Safety requirements for secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in industrial applications
IECEE CB Scheme test report (IEC 62619)

summary.en: GB/T 36276-2023 (Lithium-ion batteries for stationary energy storage) is the Chinese standard most closely aligned with IEC 62619 for the BESS cell/module level. GB 44240-2024 (mandatory safety standard for electrochemical energy storage stations) addresses system-level safety. Chinese manufacturers may hold IECEE CB reports for IEC 62619 where they target export markets — such reports are the most portable supporting documents for Ghana.
summary.zh: GB/T 36276-2023（固定式储能用锂离子电池）是与IEC 62619在BESS电芯/模组层面最接近的中国标准。GB 44240-2024（电化学储能电站安全强制标准）涵盖系统级安全。面向出口市场的中国制造商可能持有IEC 62619的IECEE CB报告，此类报告是加纳最具通用性的支持文件。
summary.zht: GB/T 36276-2023（固定式儲能用鋰離子電池）是與IEC 62619在BESS電芯/模組層面最接近的中國標準。GB 44240-2024（電化學儲能電站安全強制標準）涵蓋系統級安全。面向出口市場的中國製造商可能持有IEC 62619的IECEE CB報告，此類報告是加納最具通用性的支持文件。

standards_or_laws: IECEE CB report for IEC 62619 (if held by manufacturer)

gap.en: The exporter should verify whether the battery manufacturer holds an IECEE CB test report for IEC 62619. If only a GB/T 36276 report is available, assess whether the testing laboratory is IECEE-accredited and whether test scope maps to IEC 62619, or commission supplemental testing. A GB/T 36276-only dossier is not equivalent to an IEC 62619 CB report for Ghana conformity assessment purposes.
gap.zh: 出口商应核实电池制造商是否持有IEC 62619的IECEE CB测试报告。若仅有GB/T 36276报告，应评估测试实验室是否经IECEE认可、测试范围是否覆盖IEC 62619，必要时委托补充测试。仅有GB/T 36276档案不等同于IEC 62619 CB报告，不满足加纳符合性评定要求。
gap.zht: 出口商應核實電池製造商是否持有IEC 62619的IECEE CB測試報告。若僅有GB/T 36276報告，應評估測試實驗室是否經IECEE認可、測試範圍是否覆蓋IEC 62619，必要時委託補充測試。僅有GB/T 36276檔案不等同於IEC 62619 CB報告，不滿足加納符合性評定要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory as the principal international safety standard referenced for lithium BESS battery conformity assessment in Ghana
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 36276-2023 is a recommended standard; GB 44240-2024 is mandatory for electrochemical storage stations in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] IEC 62619 is the benchmark battery safety standard for BESS in Ghana. An IECEE CB report from an accredited lab is the most portable document; a GB/T 36276-only dossier does not substitute.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] IEC 62619是加纳BESS电池安全的基准标准。认可实验室出具的IECEE CB报告是最具通用性的文件；仅有GB/T 36276档案不能替代。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] IEC 62619是加納BESS電池安全的基準標準。認可實驗室出具的IECEE CB報告是最具通用性的文件；僅有GB/T 36276檔案不能替代。

requirement_topic.en: UN 38.3 Transport Testing — Lithium Cells and Batteries in International Shipment to Ghana
requirement_topic.zh: UN 38.3运输测试——国际运输至加纳的锂电芯和电池
requirement_topic.zht: UN 38.3運輸測試——國際運輸至加納的鋰電芯和電池

summary.en: All lithium cells and batteries transported internationally by sea, air, or land must comply with the UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3 (UN 38.3), as incorporated into IATA DGR (air), IMDG Code (sea), and ADR (road). BESS shipments to Ghana will typically travel by sea under the IMDG Code. UN 38.3 test reports are required by carriers, freight forwarders, and Ghana Revenue Authority customs for lithium battery shipments. Ghana has no country-specific derogation; standard IMDG dangerous goods documentation applies.
summary.zh: 所有经海运、空运或陆运跨国运输的锂电芯和电池，须符合IATA DGR（航空）、IMDG规则（海运）及ADR（公路）所采纳的《联合国试验和标准手册》第三部分第38.3节（UN 38.3）。BESS货物运往加纳通常经海运遵循IMDG规则。承运方、货运代理及加纳税务局海关均要求锂电池货批提供UN 38.3测试报告。加纳无特殊豁免规定，适用标准IMDG危险货物文件要求。
summary.zht: 所有經海運、空運或陸運跨國運輸的鋰電芯和電池，須符合IATA DGR（航空）、IMDG規則（海運）及ADR（公路）所採納的《聯合國試驗和標準手冊》第三部分第38.3節（UN 38.3）。BESS貨物運往加納通常經海運遵循IMDG規則。承運方、貨運代理及加納稅務局海關均要求鋰電池貨批提供UN 38.3測試報告。加納無特殊豁免規定，適用標準IMDG危險貨物文件要求。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3 (UN 38.3)
IMDG Code (sea transport of dangerous goods)
IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations (if air freight used)
Ghana Revenue Authority customs import requirements for dangerous goods

summary.en: Chinese BESS battery manufacturers exporting internationally typically hold UN 38.3 test reports issued by accredited testing laboratories. GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 do not include UN 38.3 transport testing requirements; these are covered separately by the UN test protocol and must be addressed regardless of which battery safety standard the product is certified to.
summary.zh: 面向国际出口的中国BESS电池制造商通常持有认可测试实验室出具的UN 38.3测试报告。GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023不包含UN 38.3运输测试要求；这些要求由联合国测试规程单独规定，无论产品依据何种电池安全标准认证，均须单独满足。
summary.zht: 面向國際出口的中國BESS電池製造商通常持有認可測試實驗室出具的UN 38.3測試報告。GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023不包含UN 38.3運輸測試要求；這些要求由聯合國測試規程單獨規定，無論產品依據何種電池安全標準認證，均須單獨滿足。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 (does not cover UN 38.3 transport testing)
GB/T 36276-2023 (does not cover UN 38.3 transport testing)

gap.en: The exporter must confirm that UN 38.3 test reports exist for every cell and battery type included in the BESS shipment, that the reports are current for the shipped configuration, and that all IMDG dangerous goods documentation (Safety Data Sheets, UN number declarations, packaging compliance) is prepared before the vessel booking is confirmed. Ghana Revenue Authority customs may require sight of the UN 38.3 report and SDS at clearance.
gap.zh: 出口商须确认BESS货批中每种电芯和电池类型均有UN 38.3测试报告，报告对所发货物配置有效，并在确认船期前备齐所有IMDG危险货物文件（安全数据表、UN编号申报、包装合规）。加纳税务局海关在清关时可能要求查验UN 38.3报告和安全数据表。
gap.zht: 出口商須確認BESS貨批中每種電芯和電池類型均有UN 38.3測試報告，報告對所發貨物配置有效，並在確認船期前備齊所有IMDG危險貨物文件（安全數據表、UN編號申報、包裝合規）。加納稅務局海關在清關時可能要求查驗UN 38.3報告和安全數據表。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory under IMDG Code for international sea transport of lithium batteries; Ghana Revenue Authority customs applies standard dangerous goods documentation requirements
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for international export of lithium cells and batteries from China regardless of domestic standard certification

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] UN 38.3 transport testing is mandatory for all lithium BESS batteries in international sea shipment to Ghana under the IMDG Code. This requirement exists independently of product safety certification (IEC 62619 / GB standards) and must be addressed per shipment configuration.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 依据IMDG规则，所有国际海运至加纳的锂BESS电池须强制进行UN 38.3运输测试。该要求独立于产品安全认证（IEC 62619 / GB标准），须针对每批货物配置单独满足。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 依據IMDG規則，所有國際海運至加納的鋰BESS電池須強制進行UN 38.3運輸測試。該要求獨立於產品安全認證（IEC 62619 / GB標準），須針對每批貨物配置單獨滿足。

requirement_topic.en: Fire Safety and Site Approval for BESS Installations in Ghana
requirement_topic.zh: 加纳BESS安装的消防安全与场地批准
requirement_topic.zht: 加納BESS安裝的消防安全與場地批准

summary.en: BESS installations in Ghana are subject to Ghana National Fire Service (GNFS) inspection and approval for building permits and site commissioning. The Energy Commission also requires approval for grid-connected energy storage systems under the Energy Commission Act 1997 (Act 541) and Renewable Energy Act 2011 (Act 832). Project owners and installers should prepare fire-protection design documentation, thermal runaway mitigation evidence, ventilation or gas detection plans, emergency shutdown procedures, and local-language emergency response plans for review by the GNFS and Energy Commission before commissioning.
summary.zh: 加纳BESS安装须经加纳国家消防署（GNFS）检验和批准方可取得建筑许可证及场地投运资格。能源委员会依据《1997年能源委员会法》（第541章）和《2011年可再生能源法》（第832章），亦要求并网储能系统取得批准。项目业主和安装方应在投运前备齐消防设计文件、热失控缓解证据、通风或气体探测方案、紧急停机程序及当地语言应急响应计划，供GNFS和能源委员会审查。
summary.zht: 加納BESS安裝須經加納國家消防署（GNFS）檢驗和批准方可取得建築許可證及場地投運資格。能源委員會依據《1997年能源委員會法》（第541章）和《2011年可再生能源法》（第832章），亦要求併網儲能系統取得批准。項目業主和安裝方應在投運前備齊消防設計文件、熱失控緩解證據、通風或氣體探測方案、緊急停機程序及當地語言應急響應計劃，供GNFS和能源委員會審查。

standards_or_laws: Ghana National Fire Service Act (GNFS) — site inspection and approval
Energy Commission Act, 1997 (Act 541) — grid storage approval
Renewable Energy Act, 2011 (Act 832)
IEC 62933-5-2 (safety requirements for BESS, grid-connected) — international reference

summary.en: Chinese BESS projects are governed by GB 44240-2024 (mandatory safety for electrochemical energy storage stations), GB/T 36558-2023 (general technical requirements for grid-connected electrochemical energy storage), and project-level fire-safety review under Chinese standards. These Chinese fire-safety documents do not substitute for GNFS inspection or Energy Commission approval in Ghana, but the underlying thermal runaway mitigation and fire-protection design documentation may support the Ghanaian review process.
summary.zh: 中国BESS项目依据GB 44240-2024（电化学储能电站安全强制标准）、GB/T 36558-2023（并网电化学储能系统通用技术要求）及中国标准下的项目消防审查管理。这些中国消防安全文件不能替代加纳GNFS检验或能源委员会批准，但基础的热失控缓解和消防设计文件可能支持加纳审查流程。
summary.zht: 中國BESS項目依據GB 44240-2024（電化學儲能電站安全強制標準）、GB/T 36558-2023（併網電化學儲能系統通用技術要求）及中國標準下的項目消防審查管理。這些中國消防安全文件不能替代加納GNFS檢驗或能源委員會批准，但基礎的熱失控緩解和消防設計文件可能支持加納審查流程。

gap.en: A product-level battery certificate (IEC 62619 or GB/T 36276) does not close the Ghana installation fire-safety and Energy Commission approval gap. Exporters and project owners should prepare an installation fire-protection dossier including thermal runaway mitigation evidence, ventilation/gas detection, emergency shutdown logic, monitoring records, and English-language emergency procedures for GNFS review and Energy Commission grid-storage approval.
gap.zh: 产品级电池证书（IEC 62619或GB/T 36276）不能覆盖加纳安装消防安全和能源委员会批准的差距。出口商和项目业主应准备包含热失控缓解证据、通风/气体探测、紧急停机逻辑、监控记录和英文应急程序的安装消防档案包，供GNFS审查和能源委员会电网储能批准使用。
gap.zht: 產品級電池證書（IEC 62619或GB/T 36276）不能覆蓋加納安裝消防安全和能源委員會批准的差距。出口商和項目業主應準備包含熱失控緩解證據、通風/氣體探測、緊急停機邏輯、監控記錄和英文應急程序的安裝消防檔案包，供GNFS審查和能源委員會電網儲能批准使用。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory: GNFS site inspection for building/installation approval; Energy Commission approval required for grid-connected storage under Act 541 and Act 832
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for electrochemical energy storage stations in China under GB 44240-2024 and project fire-safety review

source.publisher: Ghana Energy Commission — Renewable Energy Regulation

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] BESS installations in Ghana require GNFS site approval and Energy Commission authorization for grid-connected storage. A product-level battery safety certificate is not sufficient; prepare a full installation fire-protection and Energy Commission dossier before commissioning.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 加纳BESS安装须经GNFS场地批准和能源委员会并网储能授权。产品级电池安全证书不足够；投运前须备齐完整的安装消防和能源委员会档案包。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 加納BESS安裝須經GNFS場地批准和能源委員會併網儲能授權。產品級電池安全證書不足夠；投運前須備齊完整的安裝消防和能源委員會檔案包。
